title: Early clinical predictors of infected pancreatic necrosis: a multicentre cohort study.
author: Song K He W Wu Z Meng J Tian W Zheng S Mu D Wang R Chen H Zhu Y Wu D
content:
S-EPMC11741192 PMC11741192 Early clinical predictors of infected pancreatic necrosis: a multicentre cohort study.

Background

Infected pancreatic necrosis (IPN) exacerbates complications in patients with acute pancreatitis (AP), increasing mortality rates if not treated promptly. We aimed
